who: HR operations for small to medium-sized businesses using BambooHR
offer: For HR operations processing 5–15 new hires/month, missing onboarding paperwork causes delays in employee start dates. We automate document validation instead of manual tracking.
problem: Missing onboarding paperwork can delay the hiring process.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for HR operations
Indie Hackers discussions on HR workflows
DM outreach to HR operations professionals with demo
Community forums for HR operations tool sharing
try_it: Let users try Validation checklist and Notification system on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Offer early-access onboarding for first users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Enable CSV import for existing data
